match.message: UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier '*' is not a member of 'slave_cfg'
UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier '*' is not a member of 'svt_axi_port_configuration'
UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier 'set_is_enabled' is not a member of 'signal_valid_rdata_when_rvalid_high_check' (type 'svt_amba_err_check_stats' is undeclared)
NON_EXISTING_TYPE: Non existing type 'uvm_*'
SYSTEM_VERILOG_2012: Undefined macro name: `uvm_*
UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier 'type_id' is not a member of '*'
EXTEND_CLASS: Extending non existing class 'svt_axi_master_base_reset_sequence'
UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier 'body' is not a member of 'super'
_NON_EXISTING_TYPE: Non existing type 'svt_axi_transaction'
_UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier 'reset_mp' is not a member of 'p_sequencer' (type 'axi_virtual_sequencer' is undeclared)
_UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier 'reset_mp' is not a member of 'p_sequencer' (type 'axi_virtual_sequencer' is undeclared)
UNDECLARED_IDENTIFIER: Identifier 'set_is_enabled' is not a member of 'signal_valid_rdata_when_rvalid_high_check' (type 'svt_amba_err_check_stats' is undeclared)
